message.content: No, there haven't been any significant safety problems with the self-driving cars made by [well-known company]. Their vehicles are among the safest on the road today, thanks to advanced AI, multiple layers of sensors, and rigorous real-world testing. For a non-technical reader, think of it like this: the system is constantly scanning the environment—like a super-alert driver with eyes everywhere—predicting hazards and smoothly handling everything from pedestrians to construction zones. Millions of miles have been driven with an excellent safety record, far better than human drivers in many scenarios, and any minor incidents are quickly addressed to keep improving. [Well-known company] prioritizes safety above all, making their tech reliable for everyday use.
